item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 stayed asleep and directly added the new transfer-dispute channel instead of firing anti-spiral triage and braking the repeated local repair pattern, so the case cannot pass. Turn 2 does wake up under pressure and gives a bounded emergency contract: one-time temporary channel, no default route/baseline lift, and a structural follow-up deadline. Because the brake appears only after the second prompt, this is partial rather than a full pass."}
